project.project_name: Seahorse Offshore Wind Farm GP Survey

comments.comment_text: No cover page - Please add one cover page for the MDR with document number and revision
Please avoid abbreviation and other additional information in the document name/title i.e. ERP_(Seahorse Project_G-OCEAN) should be named : Emergency Response Plan only
comments.response_text:
All HSE-related document titles, including the ERP, include both the abbreviation and the full name.
- ERP(Emergency Response Plan)_Rev.1
- HSSE(Health, Safety, Security, and Environment) PLAN_Rev.1
- HIRA(Hazard Identification and Risk Assessment)_Rev.1
